title: Vingegaard’s Bonkers Bibs and a Brief History of Weird Cycling Wardrobes
content:
Vingegaard turned heads at Paris-Nice with his 'unique' layering strategy. Here's a look back at some of our favorite clothing WTFs.

Read the full article at Vingegaard’s Bonkers Bibs and a Brief History of Weird Cycling Wardrobes on Velo.
author: Jim Cotton
